title: lamarckia aurea
intro: Lamarckia aurea, also known as the gold thread or golden chamomile, is an annual plant in the daisy family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lamarckia aurea include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as aiding in the treatment of menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Herbal preparations of Lamarckia aurea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, oils, and creams for topical application.
